family_summary: Urban battle cluster in Grozny during the opening conventional phase of the First Chechen War, covering the New Year's assault, the shift to fighting south of the Sunzha, and immediate post-capture residual violence.
notes: Research window follows the user's requested episode constraint through 1995-03-31. The full DR estimate is completed only for the analytical citywide episode from 1994-12-31 to 1995-03-07.
